ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle model */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of the vehicle */,
  "manufacture_date" TEXT /* Date of manufacture or model release */,
  "is_ev" INTEGER /* Indicates if the vehicle is electric (true/false) */,
  "make_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the make of the vehicle */,
  "dealer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dealer selling the vehicle */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Model year of the vehicle */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the vehicle */,
  "trim_level" TEXT /* Trim level of the vehicle */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Mileage of the vehicle */,
  "vin" TEXT /* VIN of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_dealer_id FOREIGN KEY ("dealer_id") REFERENCES dealers ("dealer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES vehicle_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_make_id FOREIGN KEY ("make_id") REFERENCES makes ("make_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "makes" (
  "make_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle make */,
  "make_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle make (e.g., Ford, Tesla) */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country of origin for the vehicle make */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("make_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle type (e.g., sedan, SUV, truck) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dealers" (
  "dealer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dealer */,
  "dealer_name" TEXT /* Name of the dealership */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the dealership */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the dealership */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the dealership */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dealer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price at which the vehicle was sold */,
  "dealer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dealer making the sale */,
  "buyer_name" TEXT /* Name of the buyer */,
  "buyer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the buyer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_dealer_id FOREIGN KEY ("dealer_id") REFERENCES dealers ("dealer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_status" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle in inventory */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the vehicle (e.g., available, sold, in service) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the specific vehicle available */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the inventory record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_status_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales, admin, manager) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., sunroof, navigation) */,
  "feature_value" TEXT /* Value of the feature (e.g., yes, no) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_features_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_pricing" (
  "pricing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pricing record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the vehicle */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the vehicle */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the pricing record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pricing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_pricing_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., maintenance, accident) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_history_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dealer_incentives" (
  "incentive_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incentive record */,
  "dealer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dealer */,
  "incentive_name" TEXT /* Name of the incentive */,
  "incentive_amount" REAL /* Amount of the incentive */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the incentive */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the incentive */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incentive_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dealer_incentives_dealer_id FOREIGN KEY ("dealer_id") REFERENCES dealers ("dealer_id")
)
